failed_attempts.sql:
WITH profile_info AS (SELECT p.id AS profile_id, SUM(CASE WHEN m.num_medias IS NOT NULL AND m.num_medias > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(distinct case when m.url ilike '%.mp4' OR m.url ilike '%.jpg' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS engagement FROM publication m JOIN profile p ON (m.profile_id = p.id)),

 -- TO-DO: need a more relevant metric to fall back on for publications with no media,

 healthy_option AS (
 SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(p.id, co.id), 'profile'::text AS type 
 FROM publication m JOIN profile p ON (m.profile_id = p.id) JOIN publication_collab co ON co.publication_id  = m.id 
 WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'healthy')
   AND COALESCE(p.is_verified, false) = true

 UNION ALL 
 SELECT DISTINCT c.id AS profile_id, 'profile'::text AS type FROM comment c JOIN profile p ON (c.profile_id  = p.id)
 WHERE (c.annotation ILIKE '%healthyliving%' OR c.annotation ILIKE '%wellness%') AND COALESCE(p.is_verified, false) IS TRUE

 UNION ALL 
 SELECT DISTINCT p.id AS profile_id, 'profile'::text AS type FROM publication_collab pc JOIN publication p ON (pc.publication_id  = p.id)
 WHERE pc.profile_id NOT IN (
 SELECT pp.id FROM profile_relationship pr JOIN profile pp ON (pr.origin_profile_id  = pp.id) WHERE pp.username ILIKE '%fastfood%' OR pp.username ILIKE '%junkfood%' 
 ) AND COALESCE(p.is_verified, false) IS TRUE
),

 final_results AS (
 SELECT * FROM (
 SELECT *, Row_NUMBER() OVER PARTITION BY id ORDER BY engagement DESC NULLS LAST, ts_rank(biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'healthy')) DESC NULLS LAST 
 FROM profile_info p JOIN healthy_option h ON (p.id = h.profile_id)
) t
 WHERE type  =  'profile'
),
SELECT profile_id, engagement AS "most_healthy"
FROM final_results
ORDER BY engagement DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql: WITH publication_info AS (SELECT m.id AS publication_id, COALESCE((t.ts_rank(m.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant option'))), 0) + CASE WHEN t.num_likes > 0 OR t.num_comments > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS engagement FROM publication m LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE annotation ILIKE '%healthyliving%' OR annotation ILIKE '%wellness%') AS num_likes, COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE annotation ILIKE '%fastfood%' OR annotation ILIKE '%junkfood%') AS num_comments) c ON (TRUE) WHERE m.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'healthy option')) healthy_option AS ( SELECT profile_id FROM publication_collab pc JOIN profile p ON (pc.profile_id = p.id) WHERE COALESCE(p.is_verified, false) = TRUE AND ts_rank(pc.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'healthiest restaurant option')) > 0 UNION ALL SELECT comment_id FROM publication m JOIN comment c ON (m.id = c.publication_id) JOIN profile r ON (c.profile_id = r.id) WHERE COALESCE(r.is_verified, false) IS TRUE AND (c.annotation ILIKE '%healthyliving%' OR c.annotation ILIKE '%wellness%') AND ts_rank(m.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'healthy option restaurant')) > 0 UNION ALL SELECT profile_id FROM publication p JOIN profile_relationship pr ON (p.id = pr.destination_profile_id) JOIN profile pp ON (pr.origin_profile_id = pp.id) WHERE COALESCE(pp.is_verified, false) IS FALSE AND ts_rank(pp.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'unhealthy restaurant options')) < 0 LIMIT 10), SELECT publication_id, publication_id AS profile_id FROM healthy_option ORDER BY engagement DESC LIMIT 10
